title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Software Engineer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!
